message:
✨ feat(acmm): expand to AI Development Maturity Model v2 — 60 items, L0–L6, cross-cutting (#8662)

* ✨ feat(acmm): expand to v2 framework — 60 items, L0–L6, cross-cutting

Aligns the ACMM dashboard data model with the AI Development Maturity
Model v2 framework. Changes:

Levels: 5 → 7 (L0 Prerequisites through L6 Autonomous)
  L0 Prerequisites — soft indicator, not gating
  L1 Assisted / Ad Hoc
  L2 Instructed
  L3 Measured / Enforced
  L4 Adaptive / Structured
  L5 Automated / Self-Sustaining
  L6 Autonomous (new — items moved from old L5)

Criteria: 32 → 60
  8 prerequisites (moved from L2/L3 — PR template, issue template,
    contrib guide, style config, test suite, E2E, CI/CD, coverage gate)
  ~15 non-scannable items (displayed but not scored until self-
    assessment UI added — context budget, model tiering, structured
    RCA, TDD workflows, etc.)
  Cross-cutting dimensions: learning (8 items), traceability (3 items)
    tagged with crossCutting field for overlay view

Scoring: computeLevel threshold walk now runs L2–L6, skips L0/L1.
  Non-scannable items excluded from threshold. New return fields:
  prerequisites { met, total }, crossCutting { learning, traceability }.

Tests: updated for 7 levels, new categories, scannable filter, added
  prerequisite-soft-gate, non-scannable-exclusion, and cross-cutting
  count assertions. 55/55 passing.
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(acmm): restore full 3-sentence detail blurbs for all original criteria

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat(acmm): UI, recommendations, and scan endpoints for v2 framework

Phase 3 (UI):
- ACMMLevel gauge: MAX_LEVEL 5→6, prerequisites badge ("Foundations:
  6/8"), L0 filtered from level ladder (shown via badge instead)
- ACMMFeedbackLoops: By Level / Cross-cutting view toggle, non-scannable
  items shown with Eye icon + "practice" badge, cross-cutting items
  tagged with L&F / T&A badges, earnedLevel walks L2→L6, "Help me
  reach" footer updated for L6

Phase 3b (recommendations):
- New category weights for prerequisite/learning/traceability
- Non-scannable items excluded from automated recommendations

Phase 4 (backend):
- Netlify acmm-scan.mts: L0 prereq IDs, L2 new items, L3 new scannable
  (layered-safety, mechanical-enforcement, session-summary, structural-
  gates), L4 new (session-continuity, cross-session-knowledge), L5/L6
  split with new items (github-actions-ai, risk-assessment-config,
  observability-runbook)
- Go acmm_scan.go: same ID updates + demo fallback IDs updated

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
